name: Elemental Calling
description:
Choose one calling at 1st level:
Choose one calling at 1st level: Wanderer, Guardian of the Shrine, Cleric of the Cities, or Shaman.

Callings preserved as TODO metadata:
Wanderer - gain Survival proficiency or expertise
Guardian of the Shrine - gain martial weapon and heavy armor proficiency
Cleric of the Cities - gain Deception or Persuasion and one tool proficiency
Shaman - gain Animal Handling or Nature and advantage on Charisma checks to influence creatures tied to your element
